mission.title: containerd: 1.6.13 memory.memsw.limit_in_bytes: no such file or directory
mission.description: 1.6.13 memory.memsw.limit_in_bytes: no such file or directory. This issue affects 9+ users.

steps.title: Identify containerd troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your containerd deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd -n containerd --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review containerd configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant containerd configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd
kubectl get configmap -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=containerd
```
Errors started to appears after upgrade to 1.6.13 on k8s worker nodes with disabled swap.

steps.title: Apply the fix for 1.6.13 memory.memsw.limit_in_bytes: no such file or…
steps.description:
Skip automatic `if swapLimit == 0 { s.Linux.Resources.Memory.Swap = &limit }` when the swap controller is missing. (default on Ubuntu 20.04)

Fix #7828 (regression in PR #7783 "cri: make swapping disabled with memory limit")
```yaml
Kernel Version:                5.4.0-135-generic
  OS Image:                      Ubuntu 20.04.5 LTS
  Operating System:              linux
  Architecture:                  amd64
  Container Runtime Version:     containerd://1.6.13
```

steps.title: Confirm 1.6.13 memory.memsw.limit_in_bytes: no such file… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd -n containerd --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n containerd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
Skip automatic `if swapLimit == 0 { s.Linux.Resources.Memory.Swap = &limit }` when the swap controller is missing. (default on Ubuntu 20.04)

Fix #7828 (regression in PR #7783 "cri: make swapping disabled with memory limit")
codeSnippets:
Kernel Version:                5.4.0-135-generic
  OS Image:                      Ubuntu 20.04.5 LTS
  Operating System:              linux
  Architecture:                  amd64
  Container Runtime Version:     containerd://1.6.13

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with containerd installed or the issue environment reproducible.
